evidence.claim: The game-like interface includes visual elements and animations.
evidence.fact: The testing experience shows one question per screen in a gamified layout, equipped with a real-time timer, a progress bar, and a nugget tally that updates with animation.
evidence.user_story_span: The game-like interface includes visual elements and animations.
evidence.fact_span: one question per screen in a gamified layout, equipped with a real-time timer, a progress bar, and a nugget tally that updates with animation.

evidence.claim: The nugget counter plays an animation.
evidence.fact: The exam delivery interface includes an animated nugget counter.
evidence.user_story_span: the nugget counter plays an animation

evidence.fact: Right after the test finishes, learners receive a per-competency evaluation with weaknesses emphasized and accompanied by recommended study actions.

evidence.claim: The system presents the exam one question at a time per screen.
evidence.fact: The testing experience shows one question per screen in a gamified layout, equipped with a real-time timer, a progress bar, and a nugget tally that updates with animation.
The student profile displays earned badges.
The written justification is logged as an audit event.
